name: Charter Hall Social Infrastructure Reit
analysis: CQE's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.6500, stop A$2.4354, target A$2.9508 (1.40:1) — then trail it.
